import cv2
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

def preprocess_image(image_path, resize_dim, mean_pixel, std_pixel):
    """Preprocess an image for a computer vision task."""
    # Load image
    image = Image.open(image_path).convert("RGB")
    image = image.resize((resize_dim, resize_dim))
    
    # Convert to numpy array
    image_array = np.array(image) / 255.0
    
    # Subtract mean
    image_array = image_array - mean_pixel
    
    # Normalize
    image_array = image_array / std_pixel
    
    # Convert to float32
    image_array = image_array.astype(np.float32)
    
    return image_array

# Example usage
if __name__ == "__main__":
    image_path = "input_image.jpg"
    resize_dim = 224
    mean_pixel = [123.675, 114.062, 101.941]
    std_pixel = [67.332, 68.261, 66.762]
    
    preprocessed_image = preprocess_image(image_path, resize_dim, mean_pixel, std_pixel)
    print("Preprocessing completed successfully.")
